DataFetcher — Data Collection¶

The DataFetcher class is the main entry point for fetching data from external APIs. It composes seven specialised mixins.

Data fetcher module for retrieving financial data from external APIs.

Fetches price data, financial statements, and risk-free rates, caching all data as Parquet files in MinIO with CTL control files.

CTL Pattern:

Every data file (e.g. prices/AAPL.parquet) has a companion control file (prices/AAPL.ctl) that tracks when it was fetched, how many rows it contains, and whether it has been loaded into PostgreSQL. This makes the pipeline idempotent and resumable.

class modules.input.data_collector.DataFetcher(minio_conn)[source]¶

Bases: CacheMixin, UtilsMixin, PriceMixin, EdgarMixin, SimFinMixin, YFinanceMixin, FundamentalsMixin, RatesMixin

Fetches financial data from external APIs with MinIO caching.

Uses the parquet + CTL (control file) pattern: - Data is stored as .parquet files in MinIO - Each data file has a companion .ctl JSON file tracking metadata - Before fetching, checks if cached data exists via CTL files

Parameters:

minio_conn – MinioConnection instance for caching.

exception modules.input.data_collector.SimFinServerError[source]¶

Bases: Exception

Raised when SimFin returns HTTP 500 so caller can trigger fallback.

Cache¶

Cache management using MinIO with CTL control files.

class modules.input.data_collector.cache.CacheMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

MinIO caching methods for DataFetcher.

mark_loaded(data_type, name)[source]¶

Update a CTL file to mark data as loaded into PostgreSQL.

Parameters:

  • data_type – Category of data.

  • name – Identifier.

delete_symbol_cache(symbol)[source]¶

Delete cached price and fundamentals objects for a symbol.

Utilities¶

Shared utility functions for data fetching.

class modules.input.data_collector.utils.UtilsMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

Shared utility methods for DataFetcher.

Constants¶

Constants and configuration for data fetching modules.

exception modules.input.data_collector.constants.SimFinServerError[source]¶

Bases: Exception

Raised when SimFin returns HTTP 500 so caller can trigger fallback.

Prices¶

Price data fetching from Yahoo Finance.

class modules.input.data_collector.prices.PriceMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

Price fetching methods for DataFetcher.

fetch_prices(symbols, period='5y')[source]¶

Fetch daily price data for all symbols.

Uses yfinance batch download for efficiency. Caches per-symbol parquet files in MinIO so individual symbols can be re-fetched without re-downloading everything.

Parameters:

  • symbols – List of stock ticker symbols.

  • period – Historical period to fetch (default ‘5y’).

Returns:

Combined price data with columns: symbol,

price_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, adj_close, volume.

Return type:

pd.DataFrame

SEC EDGAR¶

SEC EDGAR data fetching infrastructure.

class modules.input.data_collector.edgar.EdgarMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

SEC EDGAR fetching methods for DataFetcher.

SimFin¶

SimFin data fetching.

class modules.input.data_collector.simfin.SimFinMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

SimFin fetching methods for DataFetcher.

yfinance Fundamentals¶

yfinance fundamentals fallback fetcher.

class modules.input.data_collector.yfinance_fundamentals.YFinanceMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

yfinance fundamentals fallback methods for DataFetcher.

Fundamentals Orchestration¶

Fundamentals fetching orchestration and waterfall merge.

class modules.input.data_collector.fundamentals.FundamentalsMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

Fundamentals orchestration methods for DataFetcher.

fetch_fundamentals(symbols, period='5y', source='waterfall')[source]¶

Fetch quarterly financial statements for all symbols.

Supports source routing: - waterfall: EDGAR -> SimFin -> yfinance -> forward fill. - simfin: SimFin only.

Per-symbol parquet files are cached in MinIO.

Parameters:

  • symbols – List of stock ticker symbols.

  • period – Historical window to keep (e.g. ‘1y’, ‘5y’, ‘max’).

  • source – Fundamentals data source strategy.

Returns:

Combined financial data with columns: symbol,

fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, report_date, total_assets, total_debt, net_income, eps, book_equity, shares_outstanding.

Return type:

pd.DataFrame

Risk-Free Rates¶

Risk-free rate fetching from OECD and yfinance.

class modules.input.data_collector.rates.RatesMixin[source]¶

Bases: object

Risk-free rate fetching methods for DataFetcher.

fetch_risk_free_rates(countries)[source]¶

Fetch monthly short-term interest rates for risk-free rate proxy.

Attempts the OECD SDMX API first. If that fails (unreliable), falls back to yfinance Treasury yield data (^IRX = 13-week T-bill). Results are cached as a single parquet + CTL in MinIO.

Parameters:

countries – List of country codes from company_static.

Returns:

country, rate_date, rate.

Return type:

pd.DataFrame with columns

Coursework One
